role: Vice Secretary of the Guardian Council; jurist member
bio: Siamak Rahpeyk is a jurist member of the [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council) and its Vice Secretary, responsible for overseeing the Council's executive and electoral affairs. Appointed to the position by Secretary [Ahmad Jannati](/people/ahmad-jannati), he has been the operational manager of Iran's candidate-vetting process. He publicly justified the mass disqualification of reformist candidates in the lead-up to the [2020 parliamentary election](/events/parliamentary-election-iran-2020). He was sanctioned by the US Treasury in February 2020 alongside [Ahmad Jannati](/people/ahmad-jannati), [Abbas-Ali Kadkhodaei](/people/abbas-ali-kadkhodaei), and others for denying Iranians free and fair elections.
editorial_notes: Born 1963 in Tehran (some sources give 1964). US Treasury sanctioned February 2020. Vice Secretary of Guardian Council.
